hero.title: Our Services
hero.description: Practical accounting, tax, compliance, technology, marketing, and outsourcing support for your business.

items.title: Business Advice
items.desc: Expert guidance for startups, expansion, operations, structure, and practical business decisions.

items.title: Accounts Preparation
items.desc: Clear financial records and accounts prepared from your source documents and summaries.

items.title: Taxation
items.desc: Support across Irish tax obligations, planning, deadlines, refunds, and Revenue correspondence.

items.title: Bookkeeping
items.desc: Recording, reconciliation, payroll, reporting, and tax-ready books for growing businesses.

items.title: Payroll
items.desc: Reliable payroll processing, payslips, Revenue filings, employee registrations, and compliance support.

items.title: Corporate & Secretarial
items.desc: Company formation, business registration, CRO filings, annual returns, and governance support.

items.title: Trademark Registration
items.desc: Brand protection support for company names, logos, symbols, and trademarks in key jurisdictions.

items.title: Technology
items.desc: Domain registration, website and logo design, website development, and business email setup.

items.title: Marketing
items.desc: Marketing support to build your name, attract customers, improve reputation, and increase sales.

items.title: Outsourcing
items.desc: Outsourced VAT, payroll, tax, bookkeeping, accounting, annual returns, and company support.
